overall.description: First-person exploration through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player walks through narrow streets and intersections with wet pavement reflecting colorful advertisements and street lights. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing futuristic urban architecture with moderate vehicle and pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian street with neon advertisements and covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow neon-lit street observing wall-mounted advertisements on the left

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying a jester face with green and red colors
elevated covered pedestrian walkway with glass railings and concrete supports
green metal railings lining the left side of the walkway
large concrete and metal bridge structure spanning the street overhead

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow enclosed pedestrian street with wet concrete reflecting neon lights. Large digital billboards line the left wall while a covered walkway structure runs along the right. The street is empty of people and vehicles, with an overhead transit bridge visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection under elevated transit structure

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into wider intersection area beneath overhead bridge structure

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection while passing under large overhead transit bridge structure

entered.detail: skyscraper with illuminated windows visible through the overhead structure
tall street lamp with multiple light fixtures

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera approaches an intersection beneath a massive overhead transit bridge. The neon billboard falls behind while a tall glass tower becomes visible in the distance. The street remains empty but distant vehicle lights indicate approaching traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and vehicle traffic

events.description: black sports car drives across crosswalk from right to left
turning right onto sidewalk after crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while vehicles pass then turning right onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving across the intersection from right to left

large white rectangular planter with palm trees in the median
multi-story curved residential building with grid-patterned windows

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide urban intersection with yellow striped crosswalk markings. A black sports car passes by on the right as the camera moves across the wet asphalt. The scene opens up to reveal a large curved apartment building and palm tree planters in the median before turning right onto the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with storefronts and street traffic

events.description: pedestrian crosses path from right to left in front of camera
white sedan drives through intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing street traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: street sign with red border displaying 'Muren' in white text
cluster of neon signs including red 'FREAK' lettering and circular pink signage
yellow striped crosswalk at the next intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the city sidewalk with neon storefront signs visible on the right including a prominent 'Muren' street sign on the left. Pedestrians cross the path intermittently while vehicles drive through the intersection ahead. The tall glass tower remains visible in the distance to the left as the camera approaches the next crosswalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic neon alleyway into a wide, bustling cyberpunk intersection. It begins by moving through a narrow pedestrian street where wet concrete reflects the glow of large digital billboards and a covered walkway. As the camera advances, the enclosed space opens up beneath a massive overhead transit bridge, shifting the focus toward a distant glass tower and the faint lights of approaching traffic. The scene then expands further as the camera crosses a wide intersection marked with yellow stripes, passing a black sports car before turning right toward a curved apartment building and palm tree planters. Finally, the movement continues along a city sidewalk lined with neon storefronts and a Muren street sign, weaving through intermittent pedestrians while the tall glass tower remains a distant landmark to the left.
